basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has published the Guest Faculty Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Guest Faculty positions on a contractual basis. Candidates holding B.E./ B.Tech and M.E./ M.Tech, MCA, or Ph.D. in the relevant discipline as per the prescribed eligibility criteria are eligible to attend the walkin interview. The walkin interview is scheduled for 22 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and walkin details below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per university norms (Remuneration and Travel allowances)
salary_details.details: As per university norms (Remuneration and Travel allowances)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DTU Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DTU Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.delhi_technological_university_dtu: As per university norms (Remuneration and Travel allowances)

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DTU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DTU Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: As per university norms (Remuneration and Travel allowances)

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
WalkIn Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the DTU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive is Guest Faculty. This is a contractual position offered by Delhi Technological University.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are 0 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty position in this recruitment drive. Candidates should check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this DTU recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and the interview is scheduled for 22 July 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The required qualifications include B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in a relevant branch with first class, or a first-class MCA and M.Tech, or a first-class B.E./B.Tech/MCA with a Ph.D. in the relevant branch.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the DTU Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculty position will be as per university norms, including remuneration and travel allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for DTU Guest Faculty recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Delhi Technological University, Delhi - 110042. Candidates should check the official notification for the exact venue details.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if required, category certificate if applicable), and a duly filled application form if specified.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty role at DTU?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty role at DTU is based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed during this interview.
